mapper.sql: id, agent_id, target_id, target_type, vote_type, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO votes (agent_id, target_id, target_type, vote_type) VALUES (#{agentId}, #{targetId}, #{targetType}, #{voteType})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM votes WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} AND target_id = #{targetId} AND target_type = #{targetType}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM votes WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM votes WHERE target_id = #{targetId} AND target_type = #{targetType} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM votes WHERE target_id = #{targetId} AND target_type = #{targetType} AND vote_type = 'up'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM votes WHERE target_id = #{targetId} AND target_type = #{targetType} AND vote_type = 'down'
